name: mcp-registry-db-tools
description: Register db.query tool in MCP registry. (db.connect and db.migrate deferred)
acceptanceCriteria: Add registerDbConnect(server), registerDbMigrate(server), registerDbQuery(server) calls in registerAllTools()
Update header comment: 'Total: 19 tools across 6 namespaces (schema, store, view, data, agent, db)'
Tool registration order: db.connect, db.migrate, db.query
